title: Berkshire CEO Greg Abel sworn in as U.S. citizen at baseball game
summary_full: Abel, a longtime Iowa resident who was born in the Canadian city of Edmonton in 1962, was among the roughly two dozen people from 16 countries who participated in an annual naturalization ceremony hosted by the Iowa Cubs Thursday night in Des Moines.
